project.title: 她在雨夜重启人生
project.genre: 都市逆袭 / 情感悬疑
project.logline: 被至亲背叛的制片助理林见月，在一场雨夜事故后获得重来七天的机会，必须在真相曝光前夺回项目与人生主动权。
project.tone: 高密度反转、强情绪钩子、电影感冷暖对比

input.theme: 女性成长、职场复仇、命运重启
input.requirement: 生成 12 集竖屏短剧，每集 60-90 秒，前三秒必须有强冲突钩子，角色资产可直接进入生图环节。
input.format: 9:16 竖屏，现代都市，写实电影质感

characters.name: 林见月
characters.visualStyle: 黑色风衣、微湿短发、清冷眼神，雨夜霓虹反光
characters.motivation: 找出项目被夺与父亲旧案之间的关联
characters.costumePrompt: 27-year-old Chinese woman, black trench coat, short wet hair, determined eyes, cinematic urban night, neon reflections, realistic drama still

characters.name: 顾言深
characters.visualStyle: 深灰西装、银边眼镜、低饱和办公室光影
characters.motivation: 用投资局揭开当年资本操盘的证据链
characters.costumePrompt: 32-year-old Chinese man, charcoal suit, silver-rim glasses, restrained expression, premium office lighting, realistic cinematic portrait

characters.name: 沈乔
characters.role: 女主闺蜜 / 反派合谋者
characters.visualStyle: 米白针织套装、珍珠耳饰、笑容温柔但眼神游离
characters.motivation: 摆脱长期配角位置，取代林见月成为项目主创
characters.costumePrompt: 28-year-old Chinese woman, ivory knit suit, pearl earrings, gentle smile with uneasy eyes, soft indoor light, realistic drama character asset

episodes.title: 雨夜，她看见自己的结局
episodes.hook: 林见月推开会议室门，屏幕上竟播放着她被全网封杀的新闻。
episodes.synopsis: 林见月发现闺蜜沈乔顶替她成为项目主创，未婚夫也站在对方阵营。争执后她冲进雨夜，被一辆黑车逼停，醒来时回到七天前。
episodes.conflict: 信任崩塌与时间重启同时发生。

shots.scene: 玻璃会议室外，雨水拍打窗面
shots.action: 林见月推门，所有人突然沉默，投影屏定格在她的黑料热搜。
shots.dialogue: 林见月：这条新闻，谁发的？
shots.imagePrompt: vertical 9:16 drama still, Chinese woman in black trench coat entering glass meeting room, rain on windows, shocked executives, projection screen glow, cinematic realism
shots.videoPrompt: handheld push-in through glass door, rain reflections, room falls silent, projection light flickers on protagonist face

shots.scene: 会议桌尽头，沈乔坐在主创席
shots.action: 沈乔温柔起身，却把林见月的策划案推到自己面前。
shots.dialogue: 沈乔：见月，你太累了，这个项目我替你扛。
shots.imagePrompt: Chinese woman in ivory knit suit standing at conference table, pearl earrings, gentle smile, stolen script deck, tense office, realistic cinematic lighting
shots.videoPrompt: close-up shot reverse shot, hand sliding project proposal across table, subtle smile, tense silence

shots.scene: 地下车库出口，冷色灯光
shots.action: 林见月抱着资料冲向雨夜，身后传来刹车声。
shots.dialogue: 顾言深：想活，就别上那辆车。
shots.imagePrompt: underground parking exit, Chinese woman running with documents, black car headlights, rain outside, mysterious man in charcoal suit, suspenseful cinematic frame
shots.videoPrompt: low-angle tracking shot, papers scatter, headlights flare, man steps from shadow, rain grows louder

episodes.title: 重来七天，第一刀先砍向合同
episodes.hook: 林见月提前十分钟截住合同，却发现签名页已经被换。
episodes.synopsis: 回到七天前后，林见月不再揭穿情绪，而是先检查合同链路。她在打印室发现沈乔留下的替换痕迹，并首次主动联系顾言深。
episodes.conflict: 女主开始从受害者转向操盘者。

shots.action: 林见月抽出签名页，发现页脚编号与原件不一致。
shots.dialogue: 林见月：原来第一步，是从这里偷走我。
shots.imagePrompt: vertical close-up, contract pages on printer, Chinese woman's hand finding mismatched footer number, fluorescent office light, thriller detail shot
shots.videoPrompt: fast overhead cut-in, fingers flip pages, mismatched page number highlighted, printer hum

shots.action: 沈乔的身影出现在玻璃反射里，林见月假装没有发现。
shots.imagePrompt: office print room glass reflection, suspicious woman in ivory outfit behind protagonist, protagonist calm, cool fluorescent lighting, vertical drama composition
shots.videoPrompt: reflection reveal in glass partition, protagonist hides contract page, soft footsteps approach

shots.camera: 手机屏幕特写转人物特写
shots.action: 林见月给顾言深发出第一条信息：我要谈一笔你不会亏的交易。
shots.imagePrompt: Chinese woman in emergency stairwell, red safety light, phone screen message, determined face, urban suspense drama still
shots.videoPrompt: phone close-up typing message, rack focus to protagonist eyes, reply notification lights her face

episodes.title: 盟友开价，真相要用信任交换
episodes.hook: 顾言深把一份旧事故档案放到桌上，封面写着林见月父亲的名字。
episodes.synopsis: 顾言深提出合作条件：林见月交出项目底稿，他提供父亲旧案线索。林见月表面同意，暗中复制了他电脑上的投资流水。

shots.action: 顾言深把旧档案推向林见月，档案袋边缘沾着雨渍。
shots.dialogue: 顾言深：你父亲不是意外。
shots.imagePrompt: premium office at night, old case file on table, rain marks, Chinese investor in charcoal suit, Chinese woman stunned, city lights, cinematic realism 9:16
shots.videoPrompt: slow table slide across old file, city lights shimmer, protagonist freezes at father's name

shots.action: 顾言深提出交换，林见月反问他为什么选择自己。
shots.dialogue: 林见月：你要的不是我的底稿，是我这枚棋子。
shots.imagePrompt: two Chinese leads facing each other near floor-to-ceiling window, night skyline, tense negotiation, restrained emotions, realistic short drama still
shots.videoPrompt: medium close-up two-shot, city reflections divide their faces, controlled confrontation

shots.scene: 办公桌边缘，笔记本电脑旁
shots.action: 林见月把 U 盘藏进戒指盒，拷贝投资流水。
shots.dialogue: 林见月：合作可以，底牌各留一张。
shots.imagePrompt: extreme close-up, USB hidden in ring box beside laptop, elegant office desk, woman's hand, suspenseful detail, cinematic realistic lighting
shots.videoPrompt: macro shot of ring box opening, USB indicator blinks, laptop reflection in protagonist eye

preview.imagePrompt: vertical 9:16 drama still, Chinese woman in black trench coat entering glass meeting room, rain on windows, shocked executives, projection screen glow, cinematic realism
preview.videoPrompt: handheld push-in through glass door, rain reflections, room falls silent, projection light flickers on protagonist face
productionNotes: 主色调使用冷蓝雨夜和会议室暖白形成对比。
前三秒必须先给黑料热搜画面，再切女主反应。
竖屏构图保留人物上半身和投影屏信息，方便字幕叠加。
